EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to pass SMTP authentification on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} passed SMTP authentification on host {event_src.host}
A user from host {src.host} failed to pass SMTP authentification on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} from host {src.host} passed SMTP authentification on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to pass SMTP authentification on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
